# FlowScript

> A diagram-as-code DSL that renders clean flowcharts from human-readable text.
> Source → SVG in one function call. No layout coordinates. No drag-and-drop.

## What it is

FlowScript is a TypeScript library (and CLI) that compiles a plain-text `.flow` file
into a polished SVG flowchart. The compiler pipeline is: **parse → layout → route → renderSVG**.

## Key files

- `README.md` — full syntax reference, API docs, SVG output conventions
- `llms-full.txt` — compact, unambiguous syntax spec for LLM consumption (start here)
- `src/index.ts` — public API: `parse`, `layout`, `route`, `renderSVG`, `render`
- `src/parser/ast.ts` — AST type definitions (`FlowDocument`, `FlowNode`, `FlowEdge`, …)
- `test/fixtures/` — canonical `.flow` examples covering every language feature

## Canonical fixture files (read these as ground truth)

| File | What it demonstrates |
|------|----------------------|
| `test/fixtures/learning-flow.flow` | Most complete: decisions, loops, subprocesses, retry edges |
| `test/fixtures/retry-edges.flow` | `~>` retry/dashed edge syntax |
| `test/fixtures/decision-back-edges.flow` | Single-quote condition syntax, back-edge loops |
| `test/fixtures/multi-branch-decision.flow` | Three-way decision branching |
| `test/fixtures/swimlanes.flow` | `#lane` swimlane layout with cross-lane edges |

## Generating SVG

```bash
npx tsx scripts/gen-svg.ts learning-flow   # renders test/fixtures/learning-flow.flow
```

## Full syntax spec

See `llms-full.txt` in this directory for the complete, LLM-optimized specification
including grammar, all node types, connection rules, common mistakes, and worked examples.
